package rulecoverage

func PositiveMapOfSlicesPrealloc() string {
    ruleID := "map_of_slices_prealloc"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`m[k] = append(m[k], v)` in loops without pre-allocating inner slices"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
